meta.name: PJSC X5 Corporate Center (ИКС 5, Пятёрочка, Перекрёсток, Чижик)

source.doc_title: Consolidated Financial Statements PJSC X5 Corporate Center 2021-2025

expense_lines.name: Expenses from expected credit losses on financial assets

data_flags: IFRS 16 LEASE OBLIGATIONS: RUA (right-of-use assets) = 502-576 млн, lease liabilities = 507-593 млн non-current + 66-78 млн current. CRITICAL for leverage analysis: Do NOT add to traditional debt without understanding implicit nature.

2024 REORGANIZATION (July 2024, re-domiciled RF): Share capital increased to 316,181 млн (was 2,458 млн for 2021-2023); reorganisation reserve of -312,190 млн offsets balance sheet. Equity structure fundamentally changed.
DEBT: Long-term debt declining 207→127→125 млн (2021-2025); short-term debt rising 87→162 млн by 2025 (refinancing/maturity profile).
GROSS MARGIN: Stable 24-25% (2021-2023), improved 25-27% (2024-2025) due to scale and operational leverage.
FINANCE COSTS: Raised sharply 58→168 млн (2021-2025) due to: IFRS16 implicit lease interest + operational debt + rate environment. FX impact ~4.5 млн swing (2024 loss, 2025 gain).
INVENTORY: Doubling from 167→326 млн (2021-2025) as store count and assortment expanded; reflected in supply chain investment.
P&L STRUCTURE: Cost of sales 74% of revenue (2021) → 76% (2025); SG&A 21%→19% (improving with scale). Pre-IFRS16 EBITDA margin ~7% (reported); post-IFRS16 operating margin = 5% (2025).
BALANCE SHEET VALIDATION: All years pass arithmetic (Assets = Equity + Liabilities). 2024 shows 2023 year-end comparative (report issued 2025-03-21 for FY2024).
2023 DATA: Sourced from 2021-2023 consolidated file (published 2024-08-14). 2024-2025 from 2024 & 2025 annual reports respectively.
CASH FLOW: CFO/CFI/CFF not extracted (requires detailed CF notes parsing). Capex 2024 = 59,554 млн; implies ~6% capex/revenue ratio.
D&A PARTIAL: Extracted 2024-2025 only (181-193 млн); historical series needed for accurate EBITDA back-fill.
NO 2020 DATA: Earliest accessible consolidated report = 2021 (FY2021 issued 2022-03-17). 2020 not readily available in online archives.
RELATED PARTY: Long-term loans to related parties (18 млн in 2021) → reduced to zero by 2023; suggests debt restructuring within group during reorganization prep.
CURRENCY: All RUB, no forex conversion needed. Unit: млн (millions).
